query: ok so the PM just assigned me BEP-2341 — it's a new endpoint to let admins bulk-deactivate users. the ticket has ACs and subtasks. can you build it?
production is on fire, users can't log in, it's been 45 minutes. need to hotfix this NOW. BEP-1992 --hotfix
i want to add rate limiting to the auth routes in tathep-platform-api. it's a new middleware, probably touches 3-4 files. let's build it
can you implement BEP-1845 for me? it's a refactor to move the payment processing logic out of the controller into a separate service layer
there's a small bug where the user profile endpoint returns a 500 when the avatar_url is null. it's a quick fix in UserController.ts. fix it using the dev loop
i need to implement the full notification system from BEP-2210 — push notifications, in-app alerts, email digest. it's a big feature
let's do the whole dev loop for this: add pagination to the /users list endpoint. currently it returns all users which is killing the DB
can you pick up BEP-1776 and run through the full development workflow? it's a medium-sized refactor of how we handle file uploads
run dlc-build on this: i need to add a soft-delete mechanism (deleted_at column) to the articles table and update all queries to filter it out
the checkout flow is broken in prod after the deploy at 2pm. BEP-9001 --hotfix. customers can't complete purchases
hey can you review my PR #847? i just added the OAuth2 Google login feature and want a thorough review
the CI is failing on PR #912 with a TypeScript error in UserService.spec.ts line 42. can you take a look?
i need to debug why the /api/reports endpoint is timing out in production. it started happening after the migration last night
can you respond to the review comments on my PR #801? the reviewer asked me to extract the validation logic into a separate function
explain how the Effect-TS Layer system works in our codebase — specifically how services are injected into use cases
i want to add a unit test for the calculateTax function in TaxService.ts. it doesn't have any tests yet
can you search the codebase for all places where we call db.query() directly without going through the repository layer?
the memory usage on our API server keeps climbing until it OOMs after about 6 hours. i've been looking at the logs and it seems to happen after high traffic. help me debug
i made a small change to update the error message in auth middleware to be more descriptive. can you commit it with a good message?
need to write a quick one-off migration script to backfill the country_code column for existing users based on their phone_number. it's not a feature, just a data fix
